name: Trojan Horse Prompting: Jailbreaking Conversational Multimodal Models by Forging Assistant Message

description: arXiv:2507.04673v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The rise of conversational interfaces has greatly enhanced LLM usability by leveraging dialogue history for sophisticated reasoning. However, this reliance introduces an unexplored attack surface. This paper introduces Trojan Horse Prompting, a novel jailbreak technique. Adversaries bypass safety mechanisms by forging the model's own past utte...
author: Wei Duan, Li Qian
